properties.displayName: UAV S1 - GNSS Spoofing via EKF Variance Anomaly
properties.description: UAV/UGV 환경에서 GNSS 스푸핑 탐지. ArduPilot EKF_STATUS_REPORT 메시지의 수평 위치잔차(PosHorizVariance)와 속도잔차(VelocityVariance) 동시 이상 급등을 z-score + 절댓값 게이트로 탐지. z-score 이상(3σ) AND 절댓값 > 0.05 (정상값 ~0.007의 7배) 동시 충족 시 알람. 지형·환경 예외는 Watchlist(GNSS_Exception_List)로 UAVId별 억제. MITRE ICS ATT&CK: T0830·T0856·T0831·T0815 / EMB3D 센서변조
properties.query:
let ExceptionList = _GetWatchlist('GNSS_Exception_List');
let baselineWindow = 24h;
let lookbackWindow = 5m;
let alertWindow = 10m;
let zScoreThreshold = 3.0;
let posVarGate = 0.05;
let velVarGate = 0.05;
UAVTelemetry_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(baselineWindow)
| where MsgType == "EKF_STATUS_REPORT"
| make-series AvgPosVar = avg(PosHorizVariance), AvgVelVar = avg(VelocityVariance)
    on TimeGenerated step lookbackWindow by UAVId
| extend (PosAnomalies, PosScore, PosBaseline) = series_decompose_anomalies(AvgPosVar, zScoreThreshold)
| extend (VelAnomalies, VelScore, VelBaseline) = series_decompose_anomalies(AvgVelVar, zScoreThreshold)
| mv-expand TimeGenerated, AvgPosVar, AvgVelVar, PosAnomalies, PosScore, VelAnomalies, VelScore
| where TimeGenerated > ago(alertWindow)
| where PosAnomalies == 1 and VelAnomalies == 1
| where todouble(AvgPosVar) > posVarGate and todouble(AvgVelVar) > velVarGate
| join kind=leftouter (
    ExceptionList
    | project UAVId = UAVId_s, MaxPosResidual_d, MaxVelResidual_d
) on UAVId
| extend isPosException = isnotnull(MaxPosResidual_d)
    and todouble(AvgPosVar) < todouble(MaxPosResidual_d)
| extend isVelException = isnotnull(MaxVelResidual_d)
    and todouble(AvgVelVar) < todouble(MaxVelResidual_d)
| where not(isPosException and isVelException)
| extend TriggerReason = "Both_PosAndVel_ZScore_AboveGate"
| extend DetectionDetail = strcat(
    "PosVar:", todouble(AvgPosVar), "|PosScore:", todouble(PosScore),
    "|VelVar:", todouble(AvgVelVar)
)
| project
    TimeGenerated = todatetime(TimeGenerated),
    UAVId,
    TriggerReason,
    DetectionDetail,
    AvgPosVar = todouble(AvgPosVar),
    AvgVelVar = todouble(AvgVelVar),
    PosScore = todouble(PosScore)
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
